sources.note: Official BMW specifications PDF used to confirm the F45 transmission table context while the 220i numeric ratio mapping remained ambiguous in extracted text.

sources.note: Official BMW release used for the 225xe drivetrain layout and transmission path.

sources.note: Official BMW 225xe specifications PDF with the documented top-gear and final-drive values used in the exact row.

sources.title: BMW PressClub F45 Active Tourer 2018 specifications PDF cross-check
sources.note: Official BMW PDF reused as a cross-check for the F45 225xe ratio pair and transmission naming.

sources.title: BMW PressClub G20 3 Series technical data attachment
sources.note: Official BMW attachment used for the G20 330i xDrive automatic final-drive verification.

sources.title: BMW PressClub G60 5 Series launch press kit
sources.note: Official BMW launch press kit used for the EU variant scope and EV drivetrain layout context of the G60 range.

sources.title: BMW PressClub G60 5 Series 2025 technical specifications PDF
sources.note: Official BMW technical specifications PDF used for the i5 eDrive40 overall ratio and single-speed transmission evidence.

sources.title: BMW PressClub G42 220i 2021 technical specifications PDF
sources.note: Official BMW technical-data PDF used for the exact G42 220i ratios, final drive, reverse ratio, and launch-standard tire.

sources.title: BMW PressClub G42 230i 2022 technical specifications PDF
sources.note: Official BMW technical-data PDF used for the exact G42 230i ratios, final drive, reverse ratio, and launch-standard tire.

sources.title: BMW PressClub F25 xDrive20i 2011 technical data PDF
sources.note: Official BMW 09/2011 technical-data PDF for the exact F25 X3 xDrive20i showing xDrive AWD, 6-speed manual and optional 8-speed automatic with Steptronic transmission paths, full forward gear ratios, single published final-drive ratio, and 225/60 R17 baseline tires.

sources.title: BMW PressClub F25 xDrive28i and xDrive35i 2011 technical data PDF
sources.note: Official BMW 09/2011 technical-data PDF for the exact F25 X3 xDrive28i and xDrive35i states showing AWD, 8-speed automatic with Steptronic only, full forward gear ratios, single published final-drive ratio, and baseline launch tires. The same PDF also shows the 2011 xDrive28i as a 2996 cc inline-6 configuration rather than the later 2.0T identity.

sources.title: BMW PressClub F25 xDrive35i 2014 technical data PDF
sources.note: Official BMW 04/2014 technical-data PDF cross-check for the exact F25 X3 xDrive35i AWD automatic state confirming the same forward ratios, 3.385 final drive, and 245/50 R18 baseline tire as the 09/2011 launch sheet.

sources.title: BMW PressClub F32 420i xDrive 2013 technical data PDF
sources.note: Official BMW launch-era technical-data PDF for the F32 420i xDrive manual and automatic states, used for the exact 2014-2015 ratio, final-drive, and baseline-tire mapping.

sources.title: BMW PressClub F32 4 Series Coupe 2016 technical data PDF
sources.note: Official BMW 03/2016 technical-data PDF for the updated F32 coupe range, used for the exact 420i xDrive and 430i xDrive automatic/manual applicability, ratio, final-drive, and 225/50 R17 baseline-tire mapping.

sources.title: BMW PressClub F32 4 Series Coupe 2013 specifications article
sources.note: Official BMW launch-era 4 Series Coupé specifications page used to confirm the original 11/2013 lineup scope, including that later 440i xDrive variants were absent from the launch-state range.

sources.title: BMW PressClub F32 440i xDrive 2016 specifications article
sources.note: Official BMW 03/2016 4 Series Coupé specifications page used to confirm when the 440i xDrive Coupé first appears in the checked official lineup.

sources.title: BMW PressClub F32 440i xDrive 2016 technical data PDF
sources.note: Official BMW 03/2016 technical-data PDF for the exact F32 440i xDrive Coupé manual and automatic states, used for the retimed 2016-only top-gear, final-drive, and baseline-tire evidence.

sources.title: BMW PressClub F48 X1 xDrive20i 2015 specifications article

sources.title: BMW PressClub F48 X1 xDrive20i 2015 technical data PDF
sources.note: Official BMW 07/2015 technical-data PDF for the exact F48 X1 xDrive20i state showing AWD, 8-speed Steptronic automatic only, 0.673 top gear, single 3.200 final-drive ratio, and 225/55 R17 baseline tires.

sources.title: BMW PressClub G15 840i xDrive Coupe technical data PDF
sources.note: Official BMW launch technical-data PDF for the exact G15 840i xDrive Coupé state showing AWD, 8-speed Steptronic, 0.640 top gear, single 2.929 final-drive ratio, and staggered 18-inch baseline tires.

sources.title: BMW PressClub F01 750i xDrive 2012 technical data PDF
sources.note: Official BMW 07/2012 technical-data PDF for the exact F01 750i xDrive state showing AWD, 8-speed automatic with Steptronic, forward ratios 4.714 / 3.143 / 2.208 / 1.667 / 1.285 / 1.000 / 0.839 / 0.667, reverse 3.317, single 2.813 final-drive ratio, and 245/50 R18 baseline tires.

sources.title: BMW PressClub F15 X5 xDrive35i 2013 technical data PDF
sources.note: Official BMW 12/2013 technical-data PDF for the exact F15 X5 xDrive35i launch state showing AWD, 8-speed automatic with Steptronic, forward ratios 4.714 / 3.143 / 2.106 / 1.667 / 1.285 / 1.000 / 0.839 / 0.667, reverse 3.295, single 3.154 final-drive ratio, and 255/55 R18 baseline tires.

sources.title: BMW PressClub F15 X5 xDrive50i 2014 technical data PDF
sources.note: Official BMW 08/2014 technical-data PDF for the exact F15 X5 xDrive50i state showing AWD, 8-speed Steptronic, forward ratios 5.000 / 3.200 / 2.143 / 1.720 / 1.313 / 1.000 / 0.823 / 0.640, reverse 3.478, single 3.154 final-drive ratio, and 255/50 R19 baseline tires.

sources.title: BMW PressClub F15 X5 xDrive40e 2015 technical data PDF
sources.note: Official BMW 05/2015 technical-data PDF for the exact F15 X5 xDrive40e state showing full hybrid drive with permanent torque vectoring to all four wheels, 8-speed Steptronic, forward ratios 4.714 / 3.143 / 2.106 / 1.667 / 1.285 / 1.000 / 0.839 / 0.667, reverse 3.317, single 3.154 final-drive ratio, and 255/55 R18 baseline tires.

sources.title: BMW PressClub F16 X6 xDrive50i 2014 launch technical data PDF
sources.note: Official BMW 06/2014 launch press-kit PDF whose technical-specification pages for the exact F16 X6 xDrive50i state show AWD, 8-speed Steptronic sport transmission, forward ratios 5.000 / 3.200 / 2.143 / 1.720 / 1.313 / 1.000 / 0.823 / 0.640, reverse 3.478, single 3.154 final-drive ratio, and 255/50 R19 baseline tires.

sources.title: BMW PressClub F26 X4 xDrive20i/xDrive28i/xDrive35i 2014 technical data PDF
sources.note: Official BMW 03/2014 technical-data PDF for the exact F26 X4 xDrive20i, xDrive28i, and xDrive35i launch states, valid from July 2014, showing AWD, 8-speed automatic with Steptronic, forward ratios 4.714 / 3.143 / 2.106 / 1.667 / 1.285 / 1.000 / 0.839 / 0.667, reverse 3.295, single 3.385 final-drive ratio, and baseline tires 225/60 R17 for xDrive20i/xDrive28i plus 245/50 R18 for xDrive35i.
